title: YoMartins
dimensions: W 37 x D 37 x H 45 cm
description: YOMARTINS is a cork stool that explores the balance between sculptural form and material honesty. Made from Portuguese cork, naturally lightweight, resilient, and tactile. It offers a comfortable seat defined by soft, considered proportions.
Composed of three solid cork elements, the piece is assembled without glue or tools. Designed to be transported flat, assembled on site.
The structure relies on a carefully designed interlocking system, where form and tension work together to ensure stability.

Sustainable by nature, the piece is made entirely from cork - a renewable, biodegradable material harvested without harming the tree. Its natural properties ensure durability, lightness, and longevity, making sustainability an inherent part of the design rather than an added feature.

Shaped by skilled artisans, the piece embraces imperfection and material honesty, resulting in an object that feels both grounded and expressive. More than a seat, it is a statement - quiet, tactile, and confidently contemporary.
YOMARTINS exists at the crossroads of object and sculpture. Its bold, almost architectural form elevates cork beyond function, revealing its texture, warmth, and raw beauty.
